name: vcd_analyzer
description: VCD waveform analysis toolkit exposed as AI Agent Skills. Each Skill emits a standardized JSON envelope ({status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}) so any LLM-based Agent (Claude Code, GPT-4 function calling, LangChain, MCP) can call it the same way.

success.suggestions: string[] — next-step guidance for the Agent

error.code: one of FILE_NOT_FOUND | PARSE_ERROR | INVALID_PROTOCOL | SIGNAL_NOT_FOUND | INVALID_TIME_RANGE | INVALID_ARGUMENT | INSUFFICIENT_DATA | RESOURCE_LIMIT | INTERNAL_ERROR
error.details: diagnostic dict (e.g. supported alternatives, available signals)

error_codes.description: VCD file does not exist or cannot be opened
VCD file format is invalid or corrupt
Signal pattern matched zero or multiple signals when one was required
Time argument failed to parse or end < begin
A CLI argument is malformed (filter pattern, condition, etc.)
The VCD does not have enough events to complete the analysis
Unhandled exception inside the Skill — please report

capabilities.description: Decode bus protocol transactions (AXI4 / APB / UART / SPI). Returns transactions, protocol violations, and performance statistics.

result_schema.transactions: array of decoded transactions (fields vary by protocol)
result_schema.statistics: summary stats (counts, latency, bandwidth, baud, etc.)

capabilities.description: Extract state machine transitions from a state signal. Detects stuck states and provides per-state duration statistics.

state.description: Signal pattern that must resolve to exactly one signal

stuck_threshold.description: Duration above which a state is reported stuck (default 100us)

capabilities.description: Find potential causes for a signal change at a specific time. Ranks candidates by temporal proximity (40%) and historical correlation (60%); automatically filters clock-like signals.

effect.description: Effect signal pattern (must resolve to exactly one signal)

at.description: Time when the effect was observed

result_schema.effect: info about the effect signal and value
result_schema.potential_causes: array of candidate causes with correlation/confidence

capabilities.description: Detect common waveform anomalies: stuck signals, glitches, metastability, bus contention. Severity-classified output suitable for triage.

result_schema.anomalies: array of {type, signal, time, severity, description, ...}
